highlights: Built and maintained scalable frontend apps in an Nx monorepo with React and TypeScript, driving a 35% improvement in application performance.

Optimized global state with Redux and Context API, streamlining async data flows and improving responsiveness.
Led development of a code-generator project with Angular, ASP.NET and MySQL that cut team development time by 30%.
Delivered client projects on time and within budget, collaborating across cross-functional teams.
Developed and optimized Angular solutions for enterprise clients.
